steps.title: Find the retail price
steps.content:
The retail price is $240\%$ of the $8.00$ wholesale price:
$$
2.40(8.00)=19.20
$$

steps.title: Apply the discount
steps.content: $70\%$ off means the discounted price is the remaining $30\%$ of the retail price: $$ 0.30(19.20)=5.76 $$ The answer is 5.76.
